---
title: Teaching
---

<!-- <img src="/img/teaching.jpg" alt="Headshot" width="310" height="275" style="float:right; margin:10px 10px 10px 10px;" /> -->

### At University of Minnesota
* APEC 3001: Intermediate Microeconomics [Undergraduate] (Fall 2025, 2026)
* APEC 8604: Environmental \& Development Economics [PhD] (Fall 2024, 2026) [[Course Material]](https://github.com/rmadhok/enviro-dev-grad)

### At University of British Columbia
* FRE 460: Economics of Food Consumption (Winter 2022, Undergraduate) [[Syllabus]](/pdf/FRE460Syllabus-RM.pdf)

<!-- ## Teaching Assistant -->
<!-- * LFS 500: Topics in PhD Microeconomics (2018-19) -->
<!-- * GPP 502: International Macroeconomics (2018-19) -->
<!-- * ECON 302: Intermediate Macroeconomics (2017-18) -->
<!-- * ECON 101: Introductory Microeconomics (2014-15) -->
<!-- * ECON 102: Introductory Macroeconomics (2014-15) -->
